regional_summary_6h.headline: Syria terrorism, Aleppo landmine incidents dominate regional threat picture
bullets: Australian arrests of three women returning from Syria with alleged IS links confirm persistent transnational militant networks originating from Syrian territory
Landmine blast injuring two civilians in northern Aleppo underscores ongoing border-security pressure near Turkish frontier
Armenian PM Pashinyan's decision to skip Moscow Victory Day signals further diplomatic rupture with Russia, potentially reshaping regional alignments
regional_summary_6h.watch: Monitor for retaliatory activity from Russian-aligned actors in response to Armenia's diplomatic shift toward the West
